epics.title: Vitest Test-Suite Performance — Cut Per-File Overhead Without Saturating the Machine
epics.archiveNote: Track A (9 tasks completed). B2 (T-007..T-010) done on branch spec/SPEC-188 but not merged (9% gain, 147-commit rebase). T-001..T-002 + T-011..T-021 cancelled (deferred/dead-end).

epics.title: Sentry Observability Hardening — source maps, environments, and logger-driven capture
API Error i18n Standardization
epics.note: 14 tasks across 4 phases (avg complexity 2.1). Centralizes translateApiError from apps/web/src/lib/api-errors.ts into @repo/i18n (T-001..T-004); web shim re-export preserves all existing callers. Phase 2 (T-005..T-006): migrate ~5 remaining genuine API-error sites in web. Phase 3 (T-007..T-010): wire admin dialogs/forms (PlanDialog, AddonDialog, RefundDialog, exchange-rate x3, sponsorship x5, CronJobsPanel). Phase 4 (T-011..T-014): add 5 missing common.apiError keys (INVALID_PAGINATION_PARAMS, NOT_IMPLEMENTED, CONFIGURATION_ERROR, QUOTA_EXCEEDED, ENTITLEMENT_REQUIRED) + CI guard test + docs + index closeout. Excluded: cache internals, error-boundaries, logger, native JS errors. Zero breaking changes to existing callers.
